data.name: MaxValueMustBeBigger
data.value: [Min Value] must be less than [Max Value]

data.name: MaxValueMustBeLessThanOrEqualsMaxValueLIMIT
data.value: [Max Value] must be less than or equals to [Max Value LIMIT]

data.name: MinValueMustBeSmaller
data.value: [Min Value] must be less than [Max Value]

data.name: MinValueLIMITMustBeLessThanMaxValueLIMIT
data.value: [Min Value LIMIT] must be less than [Max Value LIMIT]

data.name: NoHaveActionIsActive
data.value: To run requires at least one step to be active. Please check again.

data.name: MinValueMustBeLessThanOrEqualsMinValueLIMIT
data.value: [Min Value] must be less than or equals to [Min Value LIMIT]
